title: avena bromoides subsp. australis
intro: Avena bromoides subsp. australis, also known as the oat grass or oat oat grass, is a subspecies of oat grass that is native to Australia. It is a perennial grass with a rich history of medicinal use, valued for its soothing and calming properties. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Avena bromoides subsp. australis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
